portfolio.title: CAITO WIS
portfolio.subtitle: Firebase, Express, React, Node
portfolio.description: The CAITO Workforce Intelligence System is a full-stack application that uses the FERN stack to help government officials make informed data-driven decisions through the assistance of generative AI.

portfolio.title: SPEED Project
portfolio.subtitle: MongoDB, Next.js, Nest.js, & Node.js
portfolio.description: Software Practice Empirical Evidence Database (SPEED) uses the MNNN stack to help software engineering students find and evaluate empirical evidence on software engineering practices through a searchable NoSQL database, along with functionalities for submitting, moderating, analysing, and searching articles.

portfolio.title: To-Do List
portfolio.subtitle: JavaScript, HTML, CSS
portfolio.description: This is a simple to-do list app that allows people to add, tick, and delete items from the list that uses local storage to allow the page to be closed or refreshed while keeping its data.

portfolio.title: Simple Calculator
portfolio.subtitle: JavaScript, HTML, CSS
portfolio.description: This is a simple calculator that uses HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to allow the user to use addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division functions to solve mathematical problems.
